mapper.select: SELECT id, exam_id, question_type, question_content, options, score, sort_order, created_time FROM exam_question WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, exam_id, question_type, question_content, options, correct_answer, score, sort_order, created_time FROM exam_question WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT eq.id, eq.exam_id, eq.question_type, eq.question_content, eq.options, eq.correct_answer, eq.score, eq.sort_order, eq.created_time FROM exam_question eq INNER JOIN exam e ON e.id = eq.exam_id WHERE eq.id = #{questionId} AND e.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
